mainEntity.name: Is dekmantel-2026.netlify.app the official Dekmantel website?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. https://dekmantel-2026.netlify.app is an unofficial fan-made timetable companion and is not affiliated with Dekmantel organizers. The official site is https://dekmantelfestival.com/
Dekmantel Festival 2026 runs 31 July – 2 August 2026 in the Amsterdamse Bos, Amsterdam.
Dekmantel Festival takes place in the Amsterdamse Bos, Amsterdam, Netherlands.

mainEntity.name: How can I get Dekmantel Festival 2026 tickets?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tickets are sold through the official Dekmantel website at https://dekmantelfestival.com/

mainEntity.name: Where can I find the Dekmantel Festival 2026 timetable?

acceptedAnswer.text: This unofficial companion publishes machine-readable timetable data at https://dekmantel-2026.netlify.app/festival-data.json and a readable summary at https://dekmantel-2026.netlify.app/lineup-summary.md
